name: UFO Kids' Decorative Pillow - Pillowfort™
description: Take your kid on an astronomical ride by styling their room with this UFO Kids' Decorative Pillow from Pillowfort™. Made from 100% recycled polyester, this decorative pillow is designed as a UFO in metallic shade with hints of green and blue. Stuffed with 100% polyester fiber for soft cushioning, this UFO pillow is tailored in a sewn-seam closure for a refined look. You can place it on the sofa, chair, bed, or any other indoor item to create a space-themed room.
